---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or new Gmail tool
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature or new tool you'd like.

## Motivation

What problem does this solve? What use case does it enable?

## Proposed Tool or Behavior

If proposing a new tool, describe:

- **Tool name** (must start with `gmail_`): `gmail_...`
- **Description**: What it does
- **Input parameters**: List the arguments
- **Output format**: What it returns

## Gmail API Reference

Link to the relevant Gmail API documentation if applicable:
https://developers.google.com/gmail/api/reference/rest

## Alternatives Considered

A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions you've considered.

## Additional Context

Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.
